root.description: Name to assign to the security group. If omitted, Terraform will assign a random, unique name
root.name: security_group_name

root.description: Map of security group egress rules to add to the security group created
root.name: security_group_egress_rules
root.type:
map(object({
    name = optional(string)

    cidr_ipv4                    = optional(string)
    cidr_ipv6                    = optional(string)
    description                  = optional(string)
    from_port                    = optional(number, 2049)
    ip_protocol                  = optional(string, "tcp")
    prefix_list_id               = optional(string)
    referenced_security_group_id = optional(string)
    region                       = optional(string)
    tags                         = optional(map(string), {})
    to_port                      = optional(number, 2049)
  }))

root.description: A map of file protection configurations
root.name: protection

root.description: A map of mount target definitions to create
root.name: mount_targets
root.type:
map(object({
    ip_address      = optional(string)
    ip_address_type = optional(string)
    ipv6_address    = optional(string)
    region          = optional(string)
    security_groups = optional(list(string), [])
    subnet_id       = string
  }))

root.description: A map of access point definitions to create
root.name: access_points

root.description: List of IAM policy documents that are merged together into the exported document. In merging, statements with non-blank `sid`s will override statements with the same `sid`
root.name: override_policy_documents

root.description: The VPC ID where the security group will be created
root.name: security_group_vpc_id

root.description: Determines whether a replication configuration is created
root.name: create_replication_configuration

root.description: A destination configuration block
root.name: replication_configuration_destination

root.description: Security group description. Defaults to Managed by Terraform
root.name: security_group_description

root.description: Determines whether a backup policy is `ENABLED` or `DISABLED`
root.name: enable_backup_policy

root.description: If `true`, the disk will be encrypted
root.name: encrypted

root.description: Determines whether a policy is attached to the file system
root.name: attach_policy

root.description: A flag to indicate whether to bypass the `aws_efs_file_system_policy` lockout safety check. Defaults to `false`
root.name: bypass_policy_lockout_safety_check

root.description: A list of IAM policy [statements](https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/aws/latest/docs/data-sources/iam_policy_document#statement) for custom permission usage
root.name: policy_statements

root.description: Determines whether a security group is created
root.name: create_security_group

root.description: Map of security group ingress rules to add to the security group created
root.name: security_group_ingress_rules
root.type:
map(object({
    name = optional(string)

    cidr_ipv4                    = optional(string)
    cidr_ipv6                    = optional(string)
    description                  = optional(string)
    from_port                    = optional(number, 2049)
    ip_protocol                  = optional(string, "tcp")
    prefix_list_id               = optional(string)
    referenced_security_group_id = optional(string)
    region                       = optional(string)
    tags                         = optional(map(string), {})
    to_port                      = optional(number, 2049)
  }))

root.description: Determines whether resources will be created (affects all resources)
root.name: create

root.description: A map of tags to add to all resources
root.name: tags

root.description: A unique name (a maximum of 64 characters are allowed) used as reference when creating the Elastic File System to ensure idempotent file system creation. By default generated by Terraform
root.name: creation_token

root.description: The file system performance mode. Can be either `generalPurpose` or `maxIO`. Default is `generalPurpose`
root.name: performance_mode

root.description: The ARN for the KMS encryption key. When specifying `kms_key_arn`, encrypted needs to be set to `true`
root.name: kms_key_arn

root.description: Determines whether to use the common policy option for denying nonsecure transport which allows all AWS principals when accessed via EFS mounted target
root.name: deny_nonsecure_transport_via_mount_target

root.description: Determines whether a backup policy is created
root.name: create_backup_policy

root.description: The AWS Availability Zone in which to create the file system. Used to create a file system that uses One Zone storage classes
root.name: availability_zone_name

root.description: Throughput mode for the file system. Defaults to `bursting`. Valid values: `bursting`, `elastic`, and `provisioned`. When using `provisioned`, also set `provisioned_throughput_in_mibps`
root.name: throughput_mode

root.description: List of IAM policy documents that are merged together into the exported document. Statements must have unique `sid`s
root.name: source_policy_documents

root.description: Determines whether to use a name prefix for the security group. If `true`, the `security_group_name` value will be used as a prefix
root.name: security_group_use_name_prefix

root.description: The throughput, measured in MiB/s, that you want to provision for the file system. Only applicable with `throughput_mode` set to `provisioned`
root.name: provisioned_throughput_in_mibps

root.description: A file system [lifecycle policy](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/efs/latest/ug/API_LifecyclePolicy.html) object
root.name: lifecycle_policy

root.description: The name of the file system
root.name: name

root.description: Region where this resource will be managed. Defaults to the Region set in the provider configuration
root.name: region

root.description: Determines whether `aws:SecureTransport` is required when connecting to elastic file system
root.name: deny_nonsecure_transport

root.description: Amazon Resource Name of the file system
root.name: arn

root.description: The ID that identifies the file system (e.g., `fs-ccfc0d65`)
root.name: id

root.description: The latest known metered size (in bytes) of data stored in the file system, the value is not the exact size that the file system was at any point in time
root.name: size_in_bytes

root.description: Map of mount targets created and their attributes
root.name: mount_targets

root.description: ARN of the security group
root.name: security_group_arn

root.description: ID of the security group
root.name: security_group_id

root.description: Map of access points created and their attributes
root.name: access_points

root.description: The DNS name for the filesystem per [documented convention](http://docs.aws.amazon.com/efs/latest/ug/mounting-fs-mount-cmd-dns-name.html)
root.name: dns_name

root.description: The file system ID of the replica
root.name: replication_configuration_destination_file_system_id
